title: Panel – Meta Content Library Community Roundtable: Where to for Social Media Research? – #SMSociety 2026
snippet: An event speaker announcement highlighting Fabio Giglietto's participation as a featured panelist for the 'Meta Content Library Community Roundtable' at the International Conference on Social Media & Society in Glasgow. The roundtable addresses the limitations of platform-provided research data and tools in the post-CrowdTangle era.
description: Fabio Giglietto is announced as a featured panelist for the Meta Content Library Community Roundtable at the International Conference on Social Media & Society, discussing social media research challenges in the post-CrowdTangle era.

title: socialmediaandsociety.org
description: An announcement for the International Conference on Social Media & Society listing Professor Fabio Giglietto as an expert panelist discussing future pathways for social media research following the closure of CrowdTangle.

title: Indagine urbinate: "Così l’algoritmo influenza il voto" - Il Resto del Carlino

title: Algoritmi e democrazia, il caso Meta secondo lo studio di UniUrb
snippet: Press coverage detailing how Giglietto's research at the University of Urbino became a focal point of a major investigation on the television program 'Report' (Rai3). The article explains how his findings regarding Meta's political content suppression prompted formal inquiries in the European Parliament and influenced the European Commission's investigation into Meta under the Digital Services Act (DSA).
description: Press coverage from Vivere Urbino detailing how Fabio Giglietto's research at the University of Urbino regarding Meta's political content suppression prompted European Parliament inquiries and influenced a Digital Services Act investigation.

title: Facebook premia gli estremisti: la ricerca dell'Università di Urbino - Lumsanews
Meno contenuti politici nei feed, la stretta di Meta è stata meno efficace contro gli estremisti - Il Sole 24 ORE
description: News article from Il Sole 24 ORE

title: Secondo uno studio dell'università di Urbino l'algoritmo di Facebook ora punisce la politica ufficiale e premia gli estremisti antieuropei. Pd e FdI verso una legge bipartisan sulle piattaforme
snippet: A comprehensive news feature reporting on Giglietto's analysis of over 2.5 million Facebook posts. The article details how Meta's content suppression filter severely limited institutional political reach, leaving a vacuum that extremist and anti-EU groups filled, which subsequently sparked legislative discussions in Italy.
description: A prominent news feature detailing Fabio Giglietto's research at the University of Urbino on how Meta's Facebook algorithm changes suppressed institutional politics and boosted extremist content, sparking legislative debate in Italy.
